/usr/bin/c++    -rdynamic CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/A_extension.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/BASE_ISA.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/BusCtrl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/CPU.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/C_extension.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/Debug.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/F_extension.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/GPIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/Instruction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/M_extension.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/MemoryInterface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/Performance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/RV32.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/RV64.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/Registers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/Simulator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/Timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/Trace.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/Tracer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/UART.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RISCV_TLM.dir/src/extension_base.cpp.o  -o RISCV_TLM -Wl,-rpath,/usr/src/riscv64/systemc-2.3.3/build/src /usr/src/riscv64/systemc-2.3.3/build/src/libsystemc.so.2.3.3 /usr/local/lib/libspdlog.a -pthread
